svg.title: OmniD3sk WebSocket Session Flow
svg.desc: Detailed process flow showing authentication, WebSocket connection, audio streaming, and tool execution

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does auth token generation work?')
sendPrompt('How is the session token created?')
sendPrompt('What setup message does the client send?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini Live connection work?')
sendPrompt('How does the client send audio?')
sendPrompt('How is audio forwarded to Gemini?')
